content.description:
In this QUIZ Participants will be tested by their knowledge across various business domains such as finance, marketing, economics, entrepreneurship, and current affairs. Individual / Team (Max 2) Topic: General Business Knowledge & Aptitude Round 1: MCQ’s - Written Round 2: Visual connect Round 3: Strategy Round
Contact: SHAHIL & NIRMAL - 8608465572

rules.rule: Strict time limit for each round
